speaker: IACHIMO
text: The heaviness and guilt within my bosom

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Takes off my manhood. I have belied a lady,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The Princess of this country, and the air on ’t

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Revengingly enfeebles me; or could this carl,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: A very drudge of nature’s, have subdued me

speaker: IACHIMO
text: In my profession? Knighthoods and honors, borne

speaker: IACHIMO
text: As I wear mine, are titles but of scorn.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: If that thy gentry, Britain, go before

speaker: IACHIMO
text: This lout as he exceeds our lords, the odds

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Is that we scarce are men and you are gods.

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Stand, stand! We have th’ advantage of the ground.

speaker: BELARIUS
text: The lane is guarded. Nothing routs us but

speaker: BELARIUS
text: The villainy of our fears.

speaker:
GUIDERIUS
              ,
               
              as
               
              Polydor
              ,
               
              and
               
              ARVIRAGUS
              ,
               
              as
               
              Cadwal
text: Stand, stand, and fight!

speaker: LUCIUS
text: Away, boy, from the troops, and save thyself,

speaker: LUCIUS
text: For friends kill friends, and the disorder’s such

speaker: LUCIUS
text: As war were hoodwinked.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: ’Tis their fresh supplies.

speaker: LUCIUS
text: It is a day turned strangely. Or betimes

speaker: LUCIUS
text: Let’s reinforce, or fly.
